installCommand: echo "Flutter dependencies are installed during build"
buildCommand: git clone https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git -b stable --depth 1 /tmp/flutter && export PATH="$PATH:/tmp/flutter/bin" && flutter config --enable-web && flutter pub get && flutter build web --release --dart-define=SUPABASE_URL=$SUPABASE_URL --dart-define=SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=$SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
